name: neural-weights-en-us
model_lineage: v1.9.3a3-anchor-absorption encoder (UNCHANGED, step 80000 ‚Äî see the v4.15.0 lineage below) + the #884 UNIGRAM vocab-splice with FVT mean-init embeddings ‚Äî the training-free CZ/PL/SK/SI diacritic fix. The 48k SentencePiece vocab carried the diacritic CHARACTERS but no multi-char subwords containing them, so every diacritic isolated its own piece (Vysok√° ‚Üí [‚ñÅV, ys, ok, √°], ~3.3√ó English fertility) and the fragmented span resolved to the WRONG CITY. A shard retrain (v196) was falsified (held US, regressed CZ wrong-city 44‚Üí58% at convergence). The fix: train a CZ/PL SP unigram, splice ONLY its diacritic-bearing pieces into the vocab (48,000 ‚Üí 58,582; a diacritic piece can never match an ASCII span, so English tokenizes byte-identically BY CONSTRUCTION ‚Äî asserted 0/2000), and FVT mean-init the 10,582 new embedding rows from their old-tokenizer constituents. The encoder is byte-for-byte v1.9.3a3; a 2k fine-tune was ablated and retired as slightly harmful. Slovak + Slovenian ride the same pieces for free (shared codepoints + morphology). PRIOR LINEAGE: v1.9.3a3-anchor-absorption / step 80000 ‚Äî the #220/#723 postcode-anchor-pollution fix on top of v1.9.2-multilocale-au (shipped v4.14.0). Pre-seeded from the v1.9.2 step-040000 checkpoint, continued to 80k on A100. TWO coordinated levers: (1) anchor_paint_mode=shaped ‚Äî the postcode anchor is painted at TRAIN time on the same postcode-SHAPED spans inference fires on (neural/postcode-anchor.ts collectMatches), closing the #723 WHERE gap (training only ever saw the anchor on GOLD postcode spans, so the model never learned to OVERRIDE a present anchor when a leading 5-digit token is a house number that looks like a ZIP); (2) the synth-anchor-absorption counter-shard (source-weight 6.0) carrying the locality discriminator ‚Äî leading-5-digit + trailing-postcode ‚Üí house_number, + locality ‚Üí house_number, + NO locality + state ‚Üí postcode (the VT E911 format). RESULT: SLICE-H anchor-ON 20‚Üí100 (the #723 leading-5-digit house# bug fixed) at ZERO coordinate cost, confirmed by the non-circular oa-resolver-eval (2000 real OA-US points, full ship-config, v192 vs v1.9.3a3): whole-US locality-match 97.7‚Üí97.8 (+0.1), region 99.9 flat, coord p50 3.4 flat, p90 10.7 flat, p99 275.3‚Üí259.1; VT ‚Äî the E911 leading-postcode state where the entire trade lives ‚Äî FLAT at the coordinate (loc 92.6=92.6), SD +1.0. Trades us.postcode LABEL-F1 ‚àí2 (95.0) + fr.postcode ‚àí0.2 (99.3), both coordinate-invisible; gate revised (scripts/eval/gates/v4.15.0-boundary.json) with a stated reason, operator-approved. mask-regression gate (#718) PASS; int8‚Üîfp32 delta 0. Ship-config (requires) UNCHANGED from v1.9.2.
phase: v5.1.0 vocab-splice (#884) ‚Äî training-free CZ/PL/SK/SI diacritic fix: spliced tokenizer (48k‚Üí58.6k) + mean-init rows on the unchanged v1.9.3a3 encoder. Wrong-city at n=1k: CZ 22.4‚Üí14.8%, PL 27.9‚Üí7.9%, SK 22.2‚Üí13.2%, SI 18.9‚Üí10.6%; US byte-identical (int8 row dumps identical to v4.15.0)

training.corpus_version: corpus-v0.9.3a3 = v0.9.2-multilocale-au base + synth-anchor-absorption counter-shard @ source-weight 6.0 (the #220/#723 leading-5-digit discriminator, built by scripts/build-anchor-absorption-shard.mjs from 42,312 real US ZIPs)
training.recipe: v1.9.3a3-anchor-absorption: RESUMED from the v1.9.2-multilocale-au step-040000 checkpoint (pre-seeded into the run's output dir, --resume auto) and continued to 80k. TWO coordinated levers, converged via the A0‚ÜíA3 probe ladder: (1) anchor_paint_mode=shaped (a LOAD-TIME transform in encode_row ‚Äî no corpus rebuild; realign_anchor_to_pieces_shaped paints the anchor on collect_matches postcode-shaped spans, mirroring neural/postcode-anchor.ts inference, so the model trains on the anchor firing on a house-number-that-looks-like-a-ZIP); (2) the synth-anchor-absorption counter-shard (source-weight 6.0) carrying the CASE-H/CASE-P locality discriminator (the A3 fix the A2 shard lacked ‚Äî A2 cost house# by flipping leading-5-digit‚Üípostcode on locality-bearing no-trailing rows; hn-regression-diff.ts diagnosed 132/132). conventions loss-mask OFF; CE-only; lr=1.5e-4 constant, warmup 1000, seed 42. ANCHOR_FEATURE_DIM=11 unchanged (resume-safe). Loss-abort gate PASSED; the A0‚ÜíA3 probe ladder + the full-run grade adjudicated the locality discriminator.
training.tokenizer_splice: corpus-python/src/mailwoman_train/tokenizer_splice.py (build-tokenizer + mean-init): CZ/PL SP unigram trained on OpenAddresses CZ (countrywide, ƒå√öZK/R√öIAN) + PL (voivodeship dumps, GUGiK) address text; only non-ASCII-bearing pieces appended (English-safety assertion enforced). Embedding rows FVT mean-init from old-tokenizer constituent pieces; NO gradient steps (the 2k fine-tune ablation was retired).
data_attribution: OpenAddresses CZ ‚Äî ƒå√öZK R√öIAN (CC-BY 4.0): tokenizer-splice training text + the oa-cz coord eval sets
OpenAddresses PL ‚Äî GUGiK / PRG (public, BDOT-derived): tokenizer-splice training text + the oa-pl coord eval sets
OpenAddresses SK ‚Äî MINV/ZBGIS (CC-0/CC-BY per OA source): oa-sk coord eval set (free-rider validation)
OpenAddresses SI ‚Äî GURS (CC-BY per OA source): oa-si coord eval set (free-rider validation)
See THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md for the standing OpenAddresses / GeoNames / WOF attribution.

architecture.params: 33.7M (the 29.6M v1.9.3a3 encoder+48k-embedding unchanged + 10,582 spliced mean-init embedding rows ‚âà +4.1M)

requires.$comment: The SHIP-CONFIG this model was TRAINED against (#718) ‚Äî UNCHANGED from v1.5.0 (v1.8.0 cloned the v1.5.0-fr-order ship config; the single training variable was the fr-admin-split shard). The canonical ProductionScorer (@mailwoman/neural's createScorer) reads this and FAILS CLOSED if a required channel isn't actually fed ‚Äî closing the #566/#685 trap where a channel-trained model scored channel-OFF silently goes OOD. Read off the gate it shipped against (scripts/eval/gates/v0.5.0-bridge.json: requires_gazetteer_lexicon=true, requires_conventions=auto, requires_bridge=false) plus anchor (the model exports anchor_features). Additive metadata only.

notes: v5.1.0 / the #884 vocab-splice ‚Äî the training-free CZ/PL/SK/SI diacritic fix on the UNCHANGED v1.9.3a3 encoder (v4.15.0). COORDINATED model+tokenizer bump: the spliced tokenizer.model (58,582 pieces) ships in this bundle and MUST be loaded with this model (grading either against the other version's counterpart is invalid ‚Äî per-locale-f1/promotion-gate enforce tokenizer_version agreement). US safety is a GUARANTEE, not an observation: a diacritic piece cannot match an ASCII span, so English input_ids are unchanged and the encoder is untouched ‚Äî verified at the strongest level (the int8 candidate's US-2k per-row dump is BYTE-IDENTICAL to shipped v4.15.0's; region_correct 0.999 both). Wrong-city (resolved >20km, n=1k reservoir OA sets, pre-registered gates): CZ 22.4‚Üí14.8% (CI [‚àí10.3,‚àí5.1]pp), PL 27.9‚Üí7.9% ([‚àí22.7,‚àí17.4]), SK 22.2‚Üí13.2% ([‚àí11.5,‚àí6.4]), SI 18.9‚Üí10.6% ([‚àí10.4,‚àí6.4]) ‚Äî SK/SI are free riders on the CZ/PL pieces (fertility ‚àí52%/‚àí35%, zero additional bytes). Resolved-p50 improve CIs wholly negative in all four; resolve rates +2.0/‚àí0.5/+1.9/+4.4pp. KNOWN COST (operator-accepted): int8 29.8‚Üí33.8 MB (+4.06 MB, all embedding bytes) ‚Äî ~3.8 MB over the ~30 MB browser SLO; WASM latency flat (~41‚Äì44 ms p50/p95, Node 1-thread bound), session load +19 ms. Residual CZ/PL wrong-city is decode-boundary/namesake + coverage territory (name-key/span levers), not vocab. Vocab-splice does NOT scale to CJK (CharCNN is that path). Ship-config (requires) UNCHANGED ‚Äî anchor+gazetteer+conventions(auto). Pre-splice baseline: parity-scorecard-2026-07-02.md (17/17 floors PASS on v4.15.0/v5.0.0).

format.model: ONNX int8 dynamic (quantized from fp32, max fp32‚Üîint8 delta 0.3pp)
format.tokenizer: SentencePiece unigram, byte_fallback=true, vocab_size=58582 (v0.6.0-bsplice ‚Äî the #884 diacritic splice; ships WITH the model, both runtimes load it from this bundle)

calibration.method: isotonic-regression (PAVA) over per-span softmax confidence; OPT-IN via core/decoder createCalibrator
calibration.note: calibration.json + calibration-per-locale.json carried forward from v4.4.0 (architecture + label space unchanged across v1.5.0‚Üív1.8.0). Re-fit recommended next train. Apply via @mailwoman/core/decoder's createCalibrator; default parse output is byte-stable when omitted.

base_relpath: /data/models/bsplice-expanded (v1.9.3a3 step-080000 encoder + FVT mean-init spliced embeddings; expanded HF-format checkpoint also at R2 mailwoman-assets/models/bsplice-expanded/)

gate_2026_07_02_v510_vocab_splice.promotion_gate: #884 gates ALL PASS, pre-registered before measurement (gate log: /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/scratch-825/gate-v193/RESULTS.md; evidence comments on #884). US-2k non-inferiority passed at the strongest possible level ‚Äî the int8 candidate's per-row dump is byte-identical to shipped v4.15.0's. CZ/PL/SK/SI improve gates: wrong-city diff CIs wholly negative, resolved-p50 improve CIs wholly negative, resolve-rate floors held. Functional eyeball: CZ churn (103 fixed / 43 newly-wrong) diagnosed as a pre-existing locality-truncation‚Üínamesake residual exposed where the baseline won by garbage-parse fluke ‚Äî NOT a parse regression (10/10 rows read). The int8 SLO overage (+3.8 MB) was an explicit operator accept (four locales for the same bytes).

wrong_city_resolved_gt20km_n1k.$note: reservoir-sampled 1k-row OA coord sets (oa-{cz,pl,sk,si}-coord-1k.jsonl), graded parse‚Üíresolve‚Üígreat-circle, int8 ship artifact

us_2k_non_inferiority.row_dump: BYTE-IDENTICAL to shipped v4.15.0 int8 (diff 0 everywhere)

gate_2026_07_02_v510_vocab_splice.tokenization_examples: Vysok√° 4‚Üí1 piece, GrudziƒÖdz 6‚Üí1, ≈öwiƒôtokrzyska 9‚Üí1, ƒåist√° 5‚Üí2; SK fertility ‚àí51.9%, SI ‚àí35.2% on diacritic-bearing names with zero SK/SI-specific pieces

gate_2026_06_25_v415_anchor_absorption.promotion_gate: v4.15.0-boundary gate PASS after a stated, operator-approved revision of two postcode floors (us.postcode 97‚Üí95, fr.postcode 99.5‚Üí99.3). The #723 fix (SLICE-H anchor-ON 20‚Üí100) trades ‚àí2pp us.postcode LABEL-F1 on the rare leading-5-digit-postcode (VT E911) case. The trade is COORDINATE-INVISIBLE ‚Äî proven by the non-circular oa-resolver-eval below, not asserted. Every other floor holds with margin (us.locality 76.7/62.2, us.street 82.3/74, us.region 88.6/80.1, de.native_locality 89.3/83.8, arena.perturb 78/71); mask-regression gate (#718) PASS; int8‚Üîfp32 delta 0. No silent drift: the revision is in scripts/eval/gates/v4.15.0-boundary.json with the reason, mirrored here and in the promotion doc.

slice_h_anchor_on.$note: leading-5-digit house# correctly labeled house_number (not postcode) with the anchor ON ‚Äî the #723 production bug

oa_resolver_eval_us.$note: non-circular: real OA gov lat/lon vs resolved admin centroid, full ship-config (anchor+gazetteer+suppress)

vt_locality_match.$note: VT = the E911 leading-postcode state where the postcode label trade lives ‚Äî FLAT at the coordinate

label_deltas_coordinate_invisible: us.postcode -2.0 (95.0) ‚Äî rare leading-5-digit-postcode VT E911 case; VT coordinate flat (92.6=92.6)

gate_2026_06_19_fr_admin_split.promotion_gate: FR centroid gate PASS ‚Äî surpasses v1.5.0 on the SHIPPED assembled anchor-ON coordinate (held-out FR golden, 3000 disjoint communes): coord p50 42.5‚Üí2.2 km, mean 175‚Üí105.5 km (‚àí40%), r√©gion-emit 39.6‚Üí99.6%. US assembled coordinate FLAT (oa-resolver-eval, 2000 OA-US rows: locality-match 97.5‚Üí97.6, p50 3.3=3.3). Two label deltas trip the 2pp pre-publish gate, BOTH coordinate-invisible and operator-approved (#728): us.locality ‚àí2.2 (precision-only, 0 recall misses) and fr.country ‚àí3.5 (resolver given --default-country FR). No silent drift ‚Äî both stated here + on #728 + the night postmortem.
flagged_deltas_coordinate_invisible: us.locality -2.2 (precision-only ‚Äî 0 recall misses, spurious-FP on gold-locality-absent rows)
fr.country -3.5 (resolver given --default-country FR, never reaches the coordinate; abandoned v1.8.1 country-shard targeted this)

per_component_int8_shipconfig.$comment: per-locale-f1 anchor-ON matched pair vs v1.5.0 (postmortem guardrail tables). The unfolded per-tag F1 (split affix, intersections, etc.) is the authoritative `capabilities` block below. Tags off the FR-shard path (us intersections/unit, de native_locality, arena.perturb) were not re-measured for v1.8.0 ‚Äî the single training variable was the FR admin-split shard and the architecture is identical to v1.5.0.

vs_1_5_0.fr_coord_p50: 42.5 ‚Üí 2.2 km (‚àí95%) ‚Äî the win; first model in the arc to beat v1.5.0 on the shipped coordinate

files_md5.$comment: Source artifact md5s (int8 model-bsplice-meaninit-int8.onnx + tokenizer v0.6.0-bsplice). The PUBLISHED files are re-verified against these at release Step 4 (npm pack); update if the publish pipeline post-processes either.

capabilities.$comment: Per-tier (server=anchor+gazetteer; pocket=anchor-only) √ó address-system √ó tag capability manifest (#718/#719). maskOffF1 = measured per-tag exact-match F1 with the conventions mask OFF; maskOnF1 = the same with mask ON (recorded only for tags some codex forbiddenTags row suppresses ‚Äî the loader's delta-gate consults only those). createScorer FAILS CLOSED when a conventions row forbids a tag with maskOffF1 ‚àí maskOnF1 > 0.05 (the mask provably destroys a real capability). Generated by scripts/eval/gen-capability-manifest.ts against the v1.5.0 int8.
